   Rika orb smoke test report      │                                                                                   █
   Amp CLI plugin for thread bloc… │ ╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────╮ █

 * Rika performance and reliabili… │ │ Durable execution                                       │ Relay               │ █

                                   │ │ Agent loop                                              │ Baton               │ █
                                   │ ╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴─────────────────────╯ █
                                   │                                                                                   █
                                   │ ┃ This should be queued while the shell is still running.                         █
                                   │                                                                                   █
                                   │ **Acknowledging queued message timing**                                           █
                                   │                                                                                   █
                                   │ It arrived after sleep 20 had already completed on my side, so it was not         █
                                   │ processed while the shell command was still running.                              █
                                   │                                                                                   █
                                   │ ┃ Run sleep 60 in the shell, wait for it to complete, then say done.              █
                                   │                                                                                   █
                                   │ $ sleep 60 (detached)                                                             █
                                   │                                                                                   █
                                   │ ✓ Waited for sleep 60 ▾                                                           █
                                   │   Succeeded with no output.                                                       █
                                   │                                                                                   █
                                   │ Done.                                                                             █
                                   │                                                                                   █
